title: Restaurant Review
input:
★★★★☆ (4/5)
Review of The Golden Ramen
By: FoodieMike on April 20, 2026

Visited during lunch rush on Saturday. The miso ramen was rich and flavorful with perfectly soft-boiled eggs. The gyoza appetizer was crispy but a bit small for the price of $8.95.

Service was slow — waited 25 minutes for our table of two even with a reservation. My tonkotsu ramen had a great broth but the noodles were slightly overcooked.

Total bill was $47.30 for two people including tip. Location is at 567 Castro St, Mountain View.

Would come back but maybe for dinner instead of lunch.
